Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Ancestor's Tomb]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 18''' — The Ancestor's Tomb predates the Heaven's Glory School by unknown centuries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 18''' — The Ancestor's Tomb is a square mausoleum standing on vast pillars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 18''' — A mural of four gigantic beasts locked in battle is above the entrance to the Ancestor's Tomb.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 18''' — The Ancestor's Tomb is set with deep, ancient scripts that gather vital aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon and Yerin streak toward the Ancestor's Tomb.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — The Ancestor's Tomb is a massive square building with huge columns and a stone mural of four beasts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — The Ancestor's Tomb is a location where battles occurred.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — The Ancestor's Tomb contains a mural of four beasts on its ceiling.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon's scream shook every corner of the Ancestor's Tomb.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — The Ancestor's Tomb collapsed after Yerin sliced a pillar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Anses picks through the ruins of the Ancestor’s Tomb.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — The Ancestor's Tomb contains a picture similar to the door.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — The Ancestor’s Tomb is a mausoleum-like structure in Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — The Ancestor's Tomb is a location surrounded by snow in Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — The Ancestor’s Tomb is a blocky behemoth on titanic pillars.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — The route passes the Ancestor's Tomb.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — The Ancestor’s Tomb is protected by a script.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 22''' — The Ancestor’s Tomb survived the Wandering Titan’s attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 22''' — The Ancestor’s Tomb has a caved-in roof and one cracked pillar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 22''' — The inside of the Ancestor’s Tomb is a wide-open space lined with pillars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 22''' — The entrance to the Ancestor’s Tomb contains a mural of the four Dreadgods.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon is in the Ancestor’s Tomb.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — The Ancestor’s Tomb was marked by a four-part symbol.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — The Ancestor’s Tomb is a structure added to seal and control labyrinth exits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon entered the labyrinth through the Ancestor’s Tomb.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — The Ancestor’s Tomb contains a stone door that Lindon approached.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — The Ancestor’s Tomb is located just outside the former site of the Heaven’s Glory School.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
